title: Proclamation No. 1087, s. 2006
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1087

CREATING AND DESIGNATING A PROPOSED BUILDING TO BE ESTABLISHED ON A PARCEL OF LAND LOCATED AT BARANGAY CALINDAGAN DUMAGUETE CITY, NEGROS ORIENTAL, AS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CENTER PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate as Information Technology Center, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 06-122 dated 28 March 2006, of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority (PEZA), a proposed building to be established on a parcel land located at Barangay Calindagan, Dumaguete City, Province of Negros Oriental, containing an area of Seven Thousand (7,000) Square Meters , more or less, as defined by the following technical descriptions:

Lot 1-A Psd-07-065051 TCT No. 35752

A parcel of land (Lot 1-A of the subdivision plan, Psd-00-065051, being a portion of Lot 1, Pcs-07-004869, L.R.C. Record No. 144), situated in the Barrio of Calindagan, City of Dumaguete, Island of Negros. Bounded on the SE., along line 12 by Lot 1-B, of the subdivision plan; on the SW., along line 2-3 by lot 6376 Dumaguete Cadastre; and on the NW and NE., along line 3-4-1 by Lot 1-C, of the Subdivision plan.

Beginning at point marked “1” on plan, being N. 27 deg. 38′ W., 720.07 m. from BBM No. 4, Dumaguete Cadastre (Cad. 96);

IN WITNESS THEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.beginning, containing an area of SEVEN THOUSAND (7,000) SQUARE METERS , more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Points 1, 2, 3, 4 by Ps cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 x 40 cm., bearings true; date of original survey, January-August, 1916 and that of the subdivision survey executed by Rilt Renart G. Dorado, Geodetic Engineer on March 3, 2006 and was approved on March 17 2006.

Done In the City of Manila, this 8th day of June , in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Six.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
